title: Capital letters and Shift patterns
description: Mixed case typing — Shift held for caps, released for lower
text: London, Paris, New York, Tokyo. The CEO of TechCorp said: "AI will change SaaS, IoT, and ML." Alice Brown won the Nobel Prize.
finger_focus: Shift + letter for capitals — opposite-hand Shift rule

tips.text: For a capital, reach the Shift with the opposite hand. The letter's hand stays free to strike.
A sits under the left pinky, so the right Shift carries it. Let the hands divide the work.

tips.target: London, Paris, New York, Tokyo. The CEO of TechCorp said: "AI
tips.hint: Shift + letter for capitals - opposite-hand Shift rule

tips.text: L lives under the right ring finger, so the left Shift takes it. The rule is the same, mirrored.

tips.title: Note
tips.text: For an acronym - CEO, AI, SaaS - hold the Shift down through the whole word rather than tapping it letter by letter.

tips.target: will change SaaS, IoT, and ML." Alice Brown won the Nobel Prize.
tips.hint: Shift + letter for capitals - opposite-hand Shift rule

character_tips.anna: Capitals reward a smooth Shift. Opposite hand every time, and the rhythm never breaks.
character_tips.maxim: Names, places, acronyms - capitals run through everything you write at work. Drill the reach.
character_tips.knopych: Opposite-hand Shift. Once it's reflex, the big letters cost you nothing.
character_tips.klavochka: Tall letters and small ones, side by side, in step. Keep the line even.
